mapper.select: SELECT id, ds_name AS dsName, ds_key AS dsKey, ds_type AS dsType, host, port, database_name AS databaseName, password_encrypted AS passwordEncrypted, extra_params AS extraParams, max_pool_size AS maxPoolSize, status, last_test_time AS lastTestTime, last_test_result AS lastTestResult, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM datasource_configs WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM datasource_configs WHERE ds_key = #{dsKey}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO datasource_configs (ds_name, ds_key, ds_type, host, port, database_name, username, password_encrypted, extra_params, max_pool_size, created_at) VALUES (#{dsName}, #{dsKey}, #{dsType}, #{host}, #{port}, #{databaseName}, #{username}, #{passwordEncrypted}, #{extraParams}, #{maxPoolSize}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE datasource_configs SET ds_name = #{dsName}, ds_type = #{dsType}, host = #{host}, port = #{port}, database_name = #{databaseName}, username = #{username}, password_encrypted = #{passwordEncrypted}, extra_params = #{extraParams}, max_pool_size = #{maxPoolSize}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE datasource_configs SET status = #{status}, last_test_time = NOW(), last_test_result = #{lastTestResult}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
